INVOICE #INV-2024-0847
Date: March 15, 2024
Due: April 14, 2024

From: Pinnacle Design Studio LLC
123 Creative Ave, Suite 400
Portland, OR 97201
EIN: 83-4291056
Email: billing@pinnacledesign.co

Bill To: Greenfield Properties Inc.
456 Oak Street
Seattle, WA 98101
Attn: Sarah Chen, VP Operations

Description                          Qty    Rate      Amount
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Brand Identity Package                 1   $8,500.00  $8,500.00
Website Redesign (12 pages)            1  $15,000.00 $15,000.00
Social Media Templates (set of 20)     1   $2,400.00  $2,400.00

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
                              Subtotal:              $31,900.00
                           Tax (8.5%):                $2,711.50
                               TOTAL:               $34,611.50

Payment Terms: Net 30
Payment Method: Wire transfer or check
Late Fee: 1.5% per month on overdue balance

Thank you for your business!

extraction.summary: Invoice #INV-2024-0847 from Pinnacle Design Studio LLC to Greenfield Properties Inc. for $34,611.50 (including 8.5% tax) covering brand identity, website redesign, social media templates, and project management services. Due April 14, 2024.
